title: Senior Business Intelligence Analyst
raw_jd:
Role Description:
Senior Business Intelligence Analyst
The Senior Business Intelligence Analyst shall be responsible for gathering, analyzing, and compiling data needed to identify trends and patterns, and then make recommendations for business actions, efficiencies, and transformation.
Education/Experience: Must have a bachelor’s degree in business or related field and at least seven (7) years specialized experience; or nine (9) years general experience. General experience is experience gained in an office setting. Specialized experience must include, at least, three (3) years in data management and analysis experience and two (2) years of specialized experience in process engineering or supporting complex business functions or activities and providing challenging and professional deliverables, products, and services.

score.skills_rationale: Good alignment with BI, data analysis, and process improvement experience. Candidate has extensive experience in data management, analytics, and business intelligence across multiple organizations including enterprise-level implementations.
score.scope_rationale: Role appears more junior than candidate's background. Candidate has managed teams, owned product direction, and worked at director/senior manager levels, while this role reads like a senior individual contributor position with basic analysis responsibilities.
score.pay_rationale: No salary range provided in the job description, making pay alignment impossible to assess.
red_flags: Generic responsibilities without specific technologies or tools
score.bullshit_reason: Job description is too vague and generic, lacks company identification, specific technologies, salary range, and meaningful details about the actual work or organization.
score.raw_analysis: This job posting is suspiciously vague and generic, lacking basic details like company name, specific technologies, salary range, or meaningful job responsibilities. The role appears significantly junior to the candidate's background of managing teams and owning BI platforms. The generic nature and missing critical information suggest this may not be a legitimate opportunity worth pursuing.
